message:
test(semantic_quality): add 21 tests for ranking metrics, ranked_ids, violations, and harness config

Cover compute_metrics edge cases (perfect ranking, no hits, empty sets,
partial recall, MRR positioning, top_k=0), ranked_ids deduplication and
truncation, collect_violations for met/violated thresholds, summarize
with empty input, RegressionThresholds/RankingMetrics defaults, harness
with different RRF k values, empty query set, and serde roundtrips for
SemanticEvalQuery and ThresholdViolation. Expands module from 3 to 24 tests.

Contributes to wa-1u90p.7.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
